title: Citrusy Fermented Stracciatella
description: A refreshing and tangy Italian dessert made with fermented stracciatella, citrusy notes, and a hint of sweetness.

ingredients.name: Citrusy Cream (Heavy Cream + Lemon Zest + Orange Zest)

instructions: Combine fermented stracciatella, citrusy cream, granulated sugar, and lemon juice in a blender.
Stir in basil leaves and honey.
Taste and adjust sweetness or lemon juice as needed.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours.
Serve chilled and garnish with additional basil leaves if desired.
Note: Fermented stracciatella should be stored in the refrigerator at a temperature below 40°F (4°C) to prevent spoilage.
